segments.text: Then Bildad the Shuhite answered,
How long will you hunt for words? Consider, and afterwards we will speak.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Why are we counted as animals, which have become unclean in your sight?
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text:
You who tear yourself in your anger, will the earth be forsaken for you?
Or will the rock be removed out of its place?
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: “Yes, the light of the wicked will be put out. The spark of his fire won’t shine.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: The light will be dark in his tent. His lamp above him will be put out.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: The steps of his strength will be shortened. His own counsel will cast him down.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: For he is cast into a net by his own feet, and he wanders into its mesh.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: A snare will take him by the heel. A trap will catch him.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: A noose is hidden for him in the ground, a trap for him on the path.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Terrors will make him afraid on every side, and will chase him at his heels.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: His strength will be famished. Calamity will be ready at his side.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: The members of his body will be devoured. The firstborn of death will devour his members.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: He will be rooted out of the security of his tent. He will be brought to the king of terrors.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: There will dwell in his tent that which is none of his. Sulfur will be scattered on his habitation.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: His roots will be dried up beneath. His branch will be cut off above.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: His memory will perish from the earth. He will have no name in the street.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: He will be driven from light into darkness, and chased out of the world.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: He will have neither son nor grandson among his people, nor any remaining where he lived.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Those who come after will be astonished at his day, as those who went before were frightened.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Surely such are the dwellings of the unrighteous. This is the place of him who doesn’t know God.
segments.speaker: Bildad
